Iran court to hear case against director Panahi after return
content: An Iranian court will this week hear a case against director Jafar Panahi , who won top prize at last year's Cannes film festival, after he returned to Iran during the US-Israeli war against the Islamic republic, Iranian media said Monday. The case will go before a Tehran Revolutionary Court on Wednesday, the ISNA news agency reported. It added that the director, who, as well as winning the Cannes Palme d'Or, was nominated for an Oscar for his film " It Was Just an Accident ", had returned to Iran on 30 March. This was the first confirmation by media inside Iran that the director, who had expressed outrage over the crackdown on anti-government protests in January and attended the Oscars in mid-March, had returned to the country. ISNA said the hearing was being held after Panahi's lawyers appealed against a sentence - one year in prison and a two-year travel ban - he was handed in absentia in December on charges of "propaganda" against Iran's clerical system. The new hearing will be held under judge Iman Afshari, it said. Afshari is notorious for stiff sentences against dissidents and has been sanctioned by the European Union. It will also take place with this year's edition of France's film showcase the Cannes festival in full swing. The reports did not make clear if Panahi was expected to appear in court. He has not posted on his widely-followed Instagram account since February. 'It is my home' Panahi, who has endured previous spells in prison, returned to Iran after his Cannes triumph in 2025 but then stayed out of the country while promoting the film amid January protests. "It Was Just an Accident" is a politically charged film, showing five Iranians confronting a man they believe tortured them in prison, a story inspired by Panahi's own time in detention. During his globe-trotting tour to promote the film, Panahi had repeatedly vowed to return to Iran despite the potential legal repercussions and the risk of being summoned to serve his sentence. Rights groups say thousands of people were killed in the crackdown on nationwide anti-government protests in January, with Panahi one of the leading voices denouncing the actions of security forces. "This shows that the regime has reached a point where it knows it has no legitimacy left. It lost legitimacy long ago, and this massacre is the final confirmation," Panahi told AFP in an interview in February. But he added: "It is my home and I will return to my country." (AFP)

title: Power outages sweep through Kitchener communities
Lebanon president will 'do the impossible' to end Israel war
content: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun said Monday he was ready to "do the impossible" to stop the war with Israel , as the health ministry said Israeli strikes have killed more than 3,000 people. Aoun's comments came as the Israeli army carried out another series of strikes in south Lebanon, while Hezbollah said it had struck a military target in northern Israel. Since the start of the ceasefire on 17 April, Israel has continued to launch strikes, carry out demolitions and issue evacuation orders in south Lebanon, saying it is targeting the Iran-backed armed group. On Monday, it issued fresh evacuation warnings to three southern villages, and later repeated its warning to one on the outskirts of the coastal city of Tyre. Hezbollah has also continued operations against Israeli forces in south Lebanon and northern Israel, including what it said was a drone attack Monday on "the vehicle of the commander of the 300th Brigade of the Israeli enemy army". On Monday, the health ministry said the death toll from Israeli strikes since the start of the war on 2 March had reached 3,020, with 211 people 18 and under and 116 healthcare workers among those killed. "The framework that Lebanon has set for the negotiations consists of an Israeli withdrawal, a ceasefire, the deployment of the army along the border, the return of the displaced, and economic aid," Aoun said in a statement Monday. "My duty, based on my position and my responsibility, is to do the impossible, and to choose what is least costly, in order to stop the war against Lebanon and its people," he added. Last week the truce was extended for 45 days following a third round of talks between Lebanese and Israeli representatives in Washington, discussions to which Hezbollah is opposed. But the ceasefire has failed to stop the violence, with Hezbollah on Monday saying it had fired a drone at a military target in northern Israel. Ongoing demolitions The target was "an Iron Dome platform belonging to the Israeli enemy army" based in a military encampment in northern Israel, Hezbollah said, referring to Israel's air defence system. The attack was a response to Israeli violations of the ceasefire, it added. Lebanon's state-run National News Agenc y reported a series of Israeli strikes across the south. The Israeli military also issued an evacuation warning for three southern Lebanese towns. The attacks came a day after Israeli strikes killed seven people in Lebanon, including a member of the group Palestinian Islamic...

title: El país de Sudamérica que contará con un buque de guerra que promete revolucionar América Latina
content: La construcción de la Plataforma Estratégica de Superficie ( PES ) marca un nuevo capítulo para la industria naval sudamericana. El proyecto, desarrollado íntegramente con ingeniería local y acompañado de transferencia de tecnología internacional, busca fortalecer la autonomía operativa y modernizar el sector naval del país. La nueva fragata no solo representa un avance en capacidades militares, sino también un impulso estratégico e industrial, debido a que permitirá potenciar el conocimiento técnico nacional y consolidar el desarrollo de la construcción naval especializada. Especialistas destacan que la PES constituye uno de los proyectos más ambiciosos de la región, en un escenario donde las armadas latinoamericanas avanzan hacia embarcaciones más flexibles, automatizadas y digitalizadas. Gracias a su diseño multipropósito y capacidad de adaptación a distintos escenarios operativos, la plataforma es considerada una de las fragatas más modernas de América Latina . ¿Qué país de Sudamérica viene ejecutando esta construcción bajo el proyecto naval que se ha trazado en concluir? Colombia inició la construcción de su primera fragata nacional en los astilleros de Cotecmar, en un proyecto considerado histórico para la industria naval y la defensa del país. La PES será el buque de guerra más grande construido en territorio colombiano y busca modernizar de forma integral la flota de la Armada mediante tecnología de última generación y capacidades multipropósito. La embarcación forma parte de la estrategia de fortalecimiento marítimo impulsada por el gobierno colombiano, con el objetivo de mejorar la vigilancia, protección y capacidad operativa en aguas nacionales e internacionales. Además de su importancia militar, la construcción de la PES representa un impulso para el desarrollo tecnológico. Los expertos en defensa señalan que este tipo de fragatas están diseñadas para enfrentar amenazas modernas y adaptarse a distintos escenarios operativos, incluyendo misiones de patrullaje, defensa marítima, control del narcotráfico y asistencia humanitaria. Asimismo, el proyecto contempla transferencia tecnológica internacional, lo que permitirá fortalecer las capacidades de ingeniería naval colombiana y posicionar al país como un actor estratégico en la construcción de embarcaciones militares en América Latina. ¿En qué consiste este diseño que lo hace tan especial esta fragata como potencia en la armada marina? title: পরকীয়া সম্পর্কের জেরে সৌদি প্রবাসী হত্যা, আট টুকরো মরদেহ পরিবারের কাছে হস্তান্তর
content: রাজধানীর মুগদার মান্ডা এলাকায় সৌদি প্রবাসী মোকাররমকে হত্যার পর মরদেহ আট টুকরো করে বিভিন্ন স্থানে ফেলে রাখার ঘটনায় উদ্ধার করা দেহের অংশগুলো তার পরিবারের কাছে হস্তান্তর করা হয়েছে। সোমবার (১৮ মে) বিকেল সাড়ে ৪টার দিকে মুগদা থানার উপ-পরিদর্শক (এসআই) মো. আবু রায়হান নিহতের চাচাতো ভাই রিফাতের কাছে মরদেহ হস্তান্তর করেন। পুলিশ ও সংশ্লিষ্ট সূত্র জানায়, গত ১৪ মে মোকাররম হত্যাকাণ্ডের শিকার হন। এরপর রোববার (১৭ মে) মান্ডার প্রথম গলির আব্দুল করিম রোডের ২৬০/১ নম্বর ‘শাহনাজ ভিলা’র বেজমেন্ট থেকে মরদেহের সাতটি অংশ উদ্ধার করা হয়। পরবর্তীতে রাত আড়াইটার দিকে পাশের একটি ময়লার স্তূপ থেকে দেহের অবশিষ্ট মাথা উদ্ধার করা হয় বলে জানান তদন্ত সংশ্লিষ্ট কর্মকর্তারা। এভাবে মরদেহের আটটি অংশ উদ্ধার সম্পন্ন হয়। মুগদা থানার এসআই মো. আবু রায়হান জানান, উদ্ধার কার্যক্রমের সময় প্রথমে সাতটি অংশ পাওয়া গেলেও মাথা পাওয়া যাচ্ছিল না। পরে রাতের দিকে আশপাশের এলাকায় তল্লাশি চালিয়ে মাথাটি উদ্ধার করা হয়। নিহত মোকাররমের পরিবারের পক্ষ থেকে জানানো হয়, তিনি দীর্ঘদিন সৌদি আরবে কর্মরত ছিলেন এবং সম্প্রতি দেশে ফিরে আসেন। তিনি ব্রাহ্মণবাড়িয়ার আশুগঞ্জ উপজেলার বাসিন্দা। তার বাবার নাম সোহরাব মিয়া। পরিবারে তার স্ত্রী ও দুই সন্তান রয়েছে। মরদেহ গ্রহণের পর পারিবারিকভাবে গ্রামের বাড়িতে নিয়ে জানাজার পর দাফনের প্রস্তুতি নেওয়া হচ্ছে। মরদেহ হস্তান্তরের সময় নিহতের চাচাতো ভাই রিফাত বলেন, দীর্ঘদিন বিদেশে থাকার পর দেশে ফিরে তিনি এভাবে হত্যাকাণ্ডের শিকার হন, যা পরিবারের জন্য অত্যন্ত বেদনাদায়ক। এদিকে ঘটনার তদন্তে র‌্যাপিড অ্যাকশন ব্যাটালিয়ন (র‌্যাব) জানিয়েছে, হত্যাকাণ্ডটি পরকীয়া সম্পর্ককে কেন্দ্র করে সংঘটিত হয়েছে। র‌্যাবের ভাষ্য অনুযায়ী, পরকীয়া প্রেমিকা তাসলিমা আক্তার ওরফে হাসনা (৩১), তার বান্ধবী হেলেনা বেগম (৪০) এবং হেলেনার ১৩ বছর বয়সী মেয়ে মিলে মোকাররমকে হত্যা করেন এবং পরে মরদেহ টুকরো টুকরো করে বিভিন্ন স্থানে ফেলে দেন। র‌্যাব আরও জানায়, এ ঘটনায় হেলেনা বেগম ও তার ১৩ বছর বয়সী মেয়েকে গ্রেফতার করা হয়েছে। তাদের বাড়ি নরসিংদী সদর উপজেলার নন্দরামপুর এলাকায়। তবে মূল অভিযুক্ত তাসলিমা আক্তার ওরফে হাসনা এখনো পলাতক রয়েছেন বলে নিশ্চিত করেছে র‌্যাব। ঘটনাটি রাজধানীতে চাঞ্চল্য সৃষ্টি করেছে এবং আইনশৃঙ্খলা বাহিনী পলাতক আসামিকে গ্রেফতারে অভিযান অব্যাহত রেখেছে। তদন্ত সংশ্লিষ্টরা জানিয়েছেন, হত্যাকাণ্ডের পূর্ণাঙ্গ কারণ ও ঘটনাপ্রবাহ উদঘাটনে কাজ চলছে।

2005 Porsche 911 Carrera S Coupe 6-Speed at No Reserve
content: This 2005 Porsche 911 Carrera S coupe is powered by a 3.8-liter flat-six paired with a six-speed manual transaxle and features a Fabspeed intake, 19′′ Carrera S wheels, and heated adaptive front sport seats. It is finished in Arctic Silver Metallic over black leather and also has a sunroof, a rear spoiler, bi-xenon headlights, Porsche Active Suspension Management, an Escort radar detector, a Bose sound system, and a JVC head unit with Apple CarPlay connectivity. The car was acquired by the seller on BaT in January 2020 and has 113k miles. This 997.1 C2S coupe is offered at no reserve with an owner’s manual, partial service records, a clean Carfax report, and a clean Texas title in the seller’s name. The car is finished in Arctic Silver Metallic (92U) and has a power sunroof, a speed-activated rear spoiler, bi-xenon headlights, fog lights, and quadruple exhaust outlets. Close-up photos of the exterior are provided in the gallery below. The 19′′ Carrera S wheels are mounted with Michelin Pilot Sport tires that the seller notes were installed in preparation for the sale. The car is equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), Porsche Stability Management (PSM), an active brake differential (ABD), and Anti-Slip Regulation (ASR). Braking is handled by multi-piston Porsche-branded brake calipers fitted over cross-drilled and vented rotors. The cabin is appointed with heated adaptive front sport seats upholstered in black leather as well as a JVC head unit with Apple CarPlay connectivity. Additional details include a Bose sound system, automatic climate control, and cruise control. An Escort radar detector has been installed. The airbag control module was replaced in 2024. The leather-wrapped steering wheel frames a central tachometer and a 200-mph speedometer as well as gauges for oil temperature, oil pressure, coolant temperature, and fuel level. The digital odometer indicates 113k miles, approximately 8k of which were added under current ownership. The digital display in the tachometer has some dead pixels. The 3.8-liter M97 flat-six features dry-sump lubrication and was factory rated at 355 horsepower and 295 lb-ft of torque. An LN Engineering IMS bearing kit is said to have been installed in 2014 at 85k miles. A Fabspeed intake has been fitted. Power is sent to the rear wheels through a six-speed manual transaxle. The Carfax report is free of accidents and other reported damage.

title: O que são as terras raras negociadas por Lula e Trump
content: Os presidentes dos EUA, Donald Trump e do Brasil, Lula, durante encontro na Casa Branca. Foto: Ricardo Stuckert/PR As chamadas terras raras, negociadas pelos presidentes do Brasil, Lula, e dos Estados Unidos, Donald Trump, ganharam importância estratégica no mundo por serem fundamentais para tecnologias modernas, como carros elétricos, turbinas eólicas, celulares, chips e equipamentos militares. Apesar do nome, elas fazem parte de um grupo de 17 elementos químicos encontrados na crosta terrestre. O Brasil possui a segunda maior reserva do planeta, atrás apenas da China. Elementos como neodímio, praseodímio, térbio e disprósio são considerados essenciais porque possuem propriedades magnéticas e elétricas difíceis de substituir. Eles permitem fabricar motores mais leves, telas mais eficientes e baterias de alto desempenho. Especialistas descrevem esses minerais como “vitaminas da indústria tecnológica”, já que pequenas quantidades garantem grande eficiência energética e tecnológica. Embora existam reservas em vários países, o desafio está no processamento industrial. As terras raras aparecem misturadas nas rochas e possuem comportamento químico parecido, exigindo dezenas ou até centenas de etapas de separação. O processo utiliza ácidos, infraestrutura sofisticada e controle de resíduos tóxicos e radioativos, o que encarece a produção e amplia os riscos ambientais. Atualmente, a China domina cerca de 90% do processamento mundial desses minerais. Isso transformou o setor em peça central da disputa comercial e tecnológica com os Estados Unidos . O governo americano busca reduzir a dependência chinesa e vê o Brasil como parceiro estratégico para garantir acesso aos recursos. Amostras de terras raras: Óxido de cério, Bastnasita, óxido de neodímio e carbonato de lantânio. Foto: David Becker/Reuters O interesse internacional nas reservas brasileiras cresceu após discussões no Congresso Nacional e conversas entre Lula e Trump . O petista afirmou recentemente que espera ampliar projetos conjuntos com os EUA ligados às terras raras, em vez de aprofundar disputas entre Washington e Pequim. O Brasil reúne condições geológicas consideradas raras. Regiões de Minas Gerais e Goiás concentram jazidas importantes formadas por antigas atividades vulcânicas e pelo desgaste provocado pelo clima tropical ao longo de milhões de anos. Pesquisadores também destacam a existência de argilas iônicas, consideradas mais fáceis de...

Escuelas de Prince William darán kits de comida gratis este verano: mira dónde
content: Las Escuelas del Condado de Prince William (PWCS, en inglés) anunciaron el sábado su plan de servicios de comidas gratuitas durante el verano. Una de las opciones nuevas este año incluye comida para llevar. Por primera vez, el sistema escolar distribuirá kits de comida una vez a la semana a los estudiantes y sus familias. Estos kits incluirán alimentos suficientes para cinco desayunos y cinco almuerzos para cualquier menor de 18 años, informó PWCS. Los kits de comidas se entregarán, por orden de llegada, los siguientes miércoles, de 3:00 p. m. a 6:00 p. m., en Colgan High School: 4 de junio 1 de julio 8 de julio 15 de julio 22 de julio 29 de julio Si un niño está recibiendo comidas en persona en una de las sedes de la escuela de verano que se enumeran a continuación, no debe recibir también las comidas de verano para llevar, aclaró la agencia escolar. PWCS exhortó a las familias interesadas en participar a registrarse en este enlace. “El formulario es opcional y se utiliza únicamente con fines de planificación; las familias que no lo completen podrán, de todos modos, recoger las comidas hasta agotar existencias”, informó el sistema escolar en su página web. PWCS también tendrá disponible las comidas de verano de forma presencial en 33 escuelas del condado. Los días y los horarios dependerán de las escuelas. Haz clic aquí para ver todas las localidades y horarios de servicio. Source

Police respond to reports of active shooter near San Diego mosque
content: San Diego law enforcement officers are responding to reports of an active shooter situation near the Islamic Center of San Diego. WATCH LIVE COVERAGE San Diego Police Department officials said they started receiving reports of the incident at around 11:40 a.m. outside of the mosque. People, including children, have been seen being evacuated from the building. There is no immediate word on possible injuries. This is a breaking news story. Check back for updates.

Cold case killer who chewed cops’ undercover DNA bait faces survivor, families in courtroom showdown
content: A Washington man was sentenced to 50 years to life in prison after admitting to a pair of decades-old cold-case killings which investigators linked him to using a piece of gum . Mitchell Gaff, 74, was sentenced last week after he previously pleaded guilty to the murders of 21-year-old Susan Vesey and 42-year-old Judith "Judy" Weaver in Everett, according to FOX 13. Investigators linked Gaff to the 1984 murder of Weaver after detectives with the Everett Police Department visited his home while claiming to be researchers working within the gum industry and inviting him to try a free sample, USA Today reported . Gaff reportedly obliged, providing the undercover detectives with a sample that was subsequently sent through the federal database CODIS, where investigators ultimately linked him to Weaver's murder. DAUGHTERS’ RELENTLESS SEARCH SHATTERS ‘OVERDOSE’ CLAIM, LEADS TO ARREST IN MOM’S 1992 MURDER He was arrested in May 2024 and was later charged with Vesey’s killing while behind bars, with investigators revealing she had been murdered inside her apartment the day after her 21st birthday on July 12, 1980, officials said. Speaking in court on Wednesday, Gaff offered an apology to the families of both victims seated in the courtroom, while pointing to drugs and alcohol as contributing factors to his history of violence. FOLLOW THE FOX TRUE CRIME TEAM ON X "I am sorry, not because I was caught, but the consequences," Gaff said, according to NBC News. "No one did anything to deserve me coming into their lives." HORROR VIDEO CAPTURES REPEAT OFFENDER ALLEGEDLY ATTACKING 75-YEAR-OLD WOMAN, GOUGING HER EYE WITH SPIKED STICK The court also heard from Jacqueline O’Brien, a former law enforcement officer who survived a violent attack by Gaff inside her Everett home’s garage in 1979. SIGN UP TO GET TRUE CRIME NEWSLETTER "I knew he was going to kill me," O’Brien said, FOX 13 reported. O’Brien managed to escape the attack and was pivotal in helping authorities identify Gaff, who was arrested several times in the years after and spent time behind bars for the rapes of two teenage sisters in 1984. SEND US A TIP HERE "My nightmare occurred 47 years ago, but it seems like yesterday," O’Brien added. Vesey’s son, Joshua Vesey, told the court he was just 3 months old and inside the apartment when his mother was killed by Gaff, FOX 13 reported. نشرت 2500 جندي في قبرص وتشتري أراضي الجزيرة، إسرائيل تلعب بالنار مع تركيا بشرق المتوسط
content: نشرت 2500 جندي في قبرص وتشتري أراضي الجزيرة، إسرائيل تلعب بالنار مع تركيا بشرق المتوسط إسرائيل تلعب بالنار في شرق المتوسط وتركيا لن تصمت على هذا التهديد، كان هذا العنوان الرئيسي لعدد من وسائل الإعلام التركية، في سياق تغطيتها لنشر إسرائيل 2500 جندي في شرق المتوسط جنوب قبرص -الشطر اليوناني- ضمن إطار ما يسمى "قوة التدخل السريع". إسرائيل تنشر 2500 جندي جنوب قبرص وأفادت التقارير التركية، بـ نشر 2500 جندي إسرائيلي في قبرص بالشطر اليوناني، ضمن إطار "قوة التدخل السريع"، ولفتت إلى تسارع عمليات شراء إسرائيل لأراضي بالجزيرة وتعزيز التعاون العسكري الإسرائيلي في المنطقة اليونانية. وتابعت، في الوقت الذي تُطرح فيه تقييمات بأن جنوب قبرص تحولت إلى قاعدة عسكرية إسرائيلية مناهضة لـ تركيا، تم تأكيد أن أنقرة لن تتنازل عن حقوقها ومصالحها في شرق المتوسط. ولفتت التقارير، إلى أن زيادة تأثير إسرائيل في الجزيرة عبر إدارة قبرص الجنوبية اليونانية شكلت عنوان توتر جديد في شرق البحر المتوسط، وأشار الخبراء إلى شراء إسرائيل للأراضي في القطاع اليوناني وتعزيز وجودها العسكري بهدف تغيير التوازنات في المنطقة. قوة إسرائيلية في قبرص وشراء للأراضي في الجزيرة وتعليقًا على الأمر، قال البروفيسور التركي محمد هاسجولر، أن إسرائيل نشرت 2500 جندي في الجزيرة تحت مسمى "قوة التدخل السريع"، مشيرًا إلى أن ذلك يقوض الوضع القائم، وأشار إلى أن رئيس وزراء إسرائيل بنيامين نتنياهو وقائد إدارة قبرص الجنوبية نيكوس خريستودوليديس، أقاما تعاونًا وثيقًا في مجالي الدفاع والاستخبارات في السنوات الأخيرة، وأن اليونان أيضًا جزء من هذه المعادلة. من جانبه قال الأدميرال التركي المتقاعد جيهات يايجي، إن العلاقات التي طورتها إدارة قبرص الجنوبية اليونانية مع إسرائيل تستهدف الأمن القومي التركي، وأضاف يايضي: "قبرص تحولت فعليًّا إلى نقطة مراقبة عسكرية متقدمة معادية لتركيا في شرق البحر المتوسط". مؤكدًا، أن تركيا باعتبارها دولة ضامنة، تتحمل مسؤولية حماية أمن جمهورية شمال قبرص التركية، وأن الخطوات العسكرية الأحادية التي تتخذها إسرائيل وإدارة قبرص الجنوبية تزيد التوتر في الجزيرة، وشدد على أن تركيا لن تتخلى عن حقوقها ومصالحها في شرق البحر المتوسط.

content: სამოქალაქო აქტივისტი სალომე სიმონია: 201 000 ლარის 3 მანქანას, 152 700 ლარის 6 მოტოს, 10 000 ლარის წყლის ტრანსპორტს ფლობს სამეგრელოს მილიონერი დელეგატი, ილია ინჯია. ანდრია ზუგდიდიდან კი, ნათხოვარ ეტლში ჯდომისგან უკვე დიდი ხანია იტანჯება. ბავშვს ხელის დასადებიც კი არ აქვს და არც ხელში დარჩა ძალა. მხოლოდ წამალს კი არ ითხოვენ დიუშენის ბავშვები, რისთვისაც მათი მშობლები უკვე 2 წელია იბრძვიან და 1 თვეა ღამეებს ათენებენ ღია ცის ქვეშ. არამედ, მინიმალური საჭიროებებიც არ აქვთ დაკმაყოფილებული და ამაზეც უარს ეუბნებიან. ანდრიას დედამ 2-ჯერ მოითხოვა ელექტრო ეტლი და ყველა ჯერზე უარით გამოისტუმრეს. არადა, ანდრიას ჩვეულებრივი ეტლის მართვა არ შეუძლია. დედა მუშაობს. დამხმარე არ ჰყავს და ამიტომ მისი სკოლაში ტარებაც გაჭირდა. რომ არ ვიმუშავო, რითი ვარჩინოო – დედამ. მართალია, სამეგრელოს მილიონერ დელეგატს ამისთვის არ სცალია, აბა, ამხელა ქონებასა და ამდენ ბიზნესს პატრონობა და მართვა ხომ უნდა?! (მისი ქონება ნახეთ კომენტარში) თუმცა, ისევ ხალხი თუ შევძლებთ ბავშვების დახმარებას. ვისაც საშუალება გაქვთ და სურვილიც, დავეხმაროთ ანდრიას ეტლის შეძენაში. ოდნავ მაინც შევუმსუბუქოთ დარდი და ასე მაინც გავახაროთ. საქ: #GE44BG0000000498715236 თბს: #GE04TB7397845061100030 მიმღები: დარეჯან ადონია (დედა)

title: Motorola lança celular Moto G Max, com a melhor câmera da linha
content: O Moto G Max chega ao mercado como o integrante mais avançado da família , reunindo câmera de 200 MP com estabilização óptica de imagem ( OIS ), certificação militar MIL-STD-810H e certificações IP66 , IP68 e IP69 . O conjunto técnico posiciona o aparelho com preço sugerido de R$ 2.799 . Motorola Motorola O sistema de câmeras mais ambicioso da linha Moto G A lente Ultra-Res de 200 M P funciona com inteligência artificial e OIS , capturando imagens nítidas mesmo em movimento ou em condições de baixa luminosidade. A tecnologia Ultra Pixel aumenta a sensibilidade do sensor em até 16x (vezes) nesses cenários, preservando detalhes e equilíbrio nas fotos noturnas. Uma lente Ultrawide de 8 MP complementa o conjunto traseiro e expande o enquadramento para paisagens e grupos. Na frontal, a câmera de 32 MP entrega selfies com nitidez equivalente a registros de estúdio, segundo as especificações técnicas do fabricante. Resistência de nível militar e proteção máxima A estrutura externa do Moto G Max combina a certificação MIL-STD-810H com vidro Corning Gorilla Glass 7i , que oferece até 2x mais resistência a quedas e riscos . O conjunto de certificações IP66 , IP68 e IP69 representa o nível mais alto de proteção contra água e poeira já alcançado dentro da categoria, permitindo exposição a jatos pressurizados e submersão. Ficha técnica completa Especificação Detalhe Câmera traseira principal 200 MP com OIS e inteligência artificial Tecnologia de sensibilidade Ultra Pixel (até 16x maior em baixa luminosidade) Câmera Ultrawide 8 MP Câmera frontal 32 MP Tela Extreme AMOLED Super HD de 6,8 polegadas Resolução 1,5K (17% mais nítida que Full HD) Brilho máximo 5000 nits Taxa de atualização 120 Hz Bateria 5200 mAh (até 2 dias de uso) Carregamento TurboPower 33 W Certificação de resistência MIL-STD-810H Proteção de tela Corning Gorilla Glass 7i (até 2x mais resistência a quedas e riscos) Certificações de água e poeira IP66, IP68 e IP69 Cores Pantone Overture (Grafite) e Pantone Blue Atoll (Azul Claro) Preço sugerido R$ 2.799,00 Motorola A trajetória da linha Moto G Rodrigo Vidigal , presidente da Motorola no Brasil, situa o Moto G como um dos pilares históricos da fabricante. A linha foi criada para democratizar o acesso à tecnologia de qualidade e, ao longo de mais de uma década, incorporou recursos antes restritos ao segmento premium. O executivo afirma que o novo modelo carrega esse legado e reforça...

1967 Ford Mustang Fastback 289
content: This 1967 Ford Mustang fastback was retained as part of a collection by a single owner between 1982 and 2022, and it was refurbished after it was then acquired by the seller. The body was repainted Highland Green, and black interior was reupholstered. The seller tells us that both the C-code 289ci V8 and three-speed automatic were rebuilt, with the former now featuring Hooker headers and an Edelbrock intake manifold. The car rides on 14′′ Magnum 500-style wheels and also has front disc brakes and a Pioneer stereo linked to modern speakers. This Mustang fastback is now offered with a clean Kentucky title in the seller’s name. The seller tells us that the car was taken down to metal, resealed with epoxy primer, and repainted Highland Green, and it has white side stripes and a GT fuel filler cap. The tinted windshield and chrome bumpers are replacements, and weather seals were replaced. The suspension and braking systems were overhauled, per the seller, and the car has front disc brakes and 14′′ Magnum 500-style wheels mounted with Douglas tires. The cabin features front bucket seats and a rear bench upholstered in black vinyl. A Pioneer head unit is linked to modern speakers mounted in the side panels. The seller reports that the headliner, dashboard pad, carpeting, door panels, trunk mat, and heater core were all replaced. The steering wheel frames a 120-mph speedometer and auxiliary gauges for fuel level, oil pressure, coolant temperature, and voltage. The five-digit odometer has been reset and now indicates 300 miles. The seller tells us that the C-code 289ci V8 was rebuilt in 2024, and it is topped by an Edelbrock intake manifold and has Hooker headers with cutouts and a dual exhaust system. An aluminum radiator and finned valve covers were also added. Per the seller, the three-speed automatic transmission was also rebuilt.

title: Pope Leo to issue text on human dignity and AI with Anthropic co-founder
Houston Suspect Busted After Spitting On Deputies, Torching Mask In Patrol Car
content: A Houston man is facing felony charges after authorities say he spat on Harris County Precinct 5 deputies, then flicked a lighter and set a mask on fire inside a patrol car. Court records identify the suspect as 26-year-old Nzigo Pierre, who is charged with arson and harassment of a public servant. Officials described the blaze as small, reported no injuries to deputies and have not yet released the exact location of the encounter or a full timeline of events. What deputies say happened According to Harris County Precinct 5's public information officer, deputies put a mask on Pierre after he allegedly began spitting at them. The officer told FOX 26 Houston that Pierre then used a lighter to ignite the mask while he was in the patrol car, setting it on fire in the cruiser’s storage basket. Deputies quickly put out the small fire, and no injuries were reported. Officials say the investigation is still active. They have not released patrol car video or body-cam footage to the public at this time. What the charges mean under Texas law Court filings list Pierre on criminal counts of arson and harassment of a public servant. Under Texas law, arson covers intentionally starting a fire or causing an explosion and can be prosecuted as a felony if it damages a habitation, causes bodily injury or involves other aggravating factors. The full statute is outlined in Texas Penal Code §28.02 . Depending on what investigators conclude, prosecutors could also look at other property-damage or reckless-conduct provisions within Texas law, although only the current charges appear in the public filings so far. Criminal history on file Public records and name-based checks show Pierre has prior arrests and past charges, including assault causing bodily injury to a family member and an assault against a government contractor, according to FOX 26 Houston . The outlet reports those records appear in the Texas Department of Public Safety conviction database as well as searchable Harris County court files . Because online systems can lag, omit records or exclude sealed matters, official court dockets remain the most reliable source for a case’s current status. What happens next in court Since the case involves criminal counts, it will move through Harris County's criminal courts at the Criminal Justice Center in downtown Houston. Any formal charging documents, hearing dates and courtroom assignments will be handled through the Harris County District Clerk’s office, which maintains...

title: From The Sports Desk: The NBA’s Final Four is here
content: The Cleveland Cavaliers shocked the basketball world Sunday with a 31-point road win in Game 7 to advance past the Detroit Pistons and into the Eastern Conference Finals. There they’ll meet the red-hot New York Knicks, who have not lost in the postseason since May. Subscribe to read this story ad-free Get unlimited access to ad-free articles and exclusive content. In the West, the Victor Wembanyama-led San Antonio Spurs will face the defending NBA champion Oklahoma City Thunder in a matchup of the top two teams in the league. That series starts tonight and will be streamed on Peacock . Also, our World Cup countdown continues with Colombia star Luis Díaz. For more WNBA and World Cup coverage, check out the NBC News website . NBA Conference Finals Preview Donovan Mitchell reacts against the Detroit Pistons in the NBA Eastern Conference Playoffs on May 17, 2026, in Detroit, MI. Gregory Shamus / Getty Images After a blowout win Sunday by the Cleveland Cavaliers over the Detroit Pistons in Game 7 of their second-round series, the conference finals are now set: The Cavaliers will play the New York Knicks in the East, and the San Antonio Spurs will play the Oklahoma City Thunder in the West. Here’s a quick preview of both matchups. Let’s start with the Thunder and Spurs, a titanic clash that begins tonight between the two best teams from the regular season. Let me put this as simply as I can: Whether you love the NBA or not, you need to find a way to watch every minute of this series. This is the first time since 1998 that two teams with at least 62 regular-season wins have met in the playoffs, and we should be in store for an incredibly hard-fought battle. This matchup features two ascendant young stars in Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Victor Wembanyama (who finished first and third in MVP voting, respectively), exciting young talent, a legitimate regional rivalry and two suffocating defenses. It’s as high-level as hoops gets on the court, with the added bonus of animus and history off the court to ratchet up the tension. San Antonio won the regular-season series over OKC 4-1, but the Thunder practically never had their full squad available. Game 1 should be a little bit of a feel-out process for both sides. In the East, the dominant Knicks will take on Cleveland. New York has won seven straight playoff games and owns a playoff-best 20.0 net rating. The Knicks should be heavily favored this series as the Cavs have labored through the playoffs, needing seven...

يقول إيمانويل ماكرون إن كيبيك يمكنها مساعدة فرنسا “بعدة طرق”
content: وبحسب الرئيس الفرنسي إيمانويل ماكرون، يمكن لكيبيك أن تساعد فرنسا في “مجالات عديدة”، مثل “البحث” أو “الذكاء الاصطناعي” أو حتى “الاستراتيجية”. وتحدث للصحافة أثناء ترحيبه برئيسة وزراء كيبيك كريستين فريشيت في قصر الإليزيه يوم الاثنين. وأضاف: “كيبيك موضع ترحيب دائمًا”. وقبل ذلك بدقائق، التقت فريشيت برئيس الوزراء الفرنسي سيباستيان ليكورن في ماتينيون. كما أتاح الاجتماع فرصة لشركة Invest Quebec لتجديد اتفاقية متبادلة مع Business France. وتهدف الاتفاقية إلى دعم شركات كيبيك في فرنسا والشركات الفرنسية في كيبيك. وفي وقت سابق من يوم الاثنين، دافعت فريشيت عن كيبيك باعتبارها “شريكًا موثوقًا به” لفرنسا وأوروبا في قطاع المعادن الحيوي والاستراتيجي، أثناء مشاركتها في مناقشة مائدة مستديرة مع ممثلي الحكومة الفرنسية وأصحاب المصلحة الاقتصاديين. وأقيم الحفل بين وفد كيبيك في باريس. تستمر القصة أسفل الإعلان وأشار رئيس الوزراء إلى “الثروة الكبيرة” التي تتمتع بها كيبيك من حيث المعادن المهمة. احصل على الأخبار الوطنية اليومية احصل على أخبار كندا اليومية التي يتم تسليمها إلى بريدك الوارد حتى لا تفوت أفضل القصص اليومية. وأكد “أولا وقبل كل شيء، لدينا موارد على أراضي كيبيك. لذا، هناك عنصر مهم للغاية: لدينا أكبر حصة من المعادن الحيوية والاستراتيجية في كندا. حصة جيدة منها. لدينا 28 في المجموع”. 0:47 كارني يقول إن أستراليا ستنضم إلى تحالف المعادن المهمة لمجموعة السبع المزيد عن كندا المزيد من الفيديوهات وقال رئيس الوزراء إنه يريد تطوير القطاع بطريقة “مستدامة” و”مسؤولة”، مسلطا الضوء على الطاقة النظيفة في كيبيك. ومع خطط لاستثمار 800 مليار يورو لاستعادة أوروبا، تأمل الحكومة أن تأتي كيبيك على القمة وتحصل على حصتها من صفقة الدفاع. ووفقا لفريشيت، فإن المعادن الاستراتيجية لها “أهمية استراتيجية” في “عصر يتسم بالاضطرابات الجيوسياسية”. وأوضح رئيس الوزراء: “نحن في فترة سيزداد فيها الإنفاق المتعلق بالدفاع والمعادن الحيوية والاستراتيجية. وهذا هو الحال هنا في أوروبا، ولكن أيضًا في كندا، حيث توجد رغبة في زيادة المساهمة في ميزانية الناتو بنسبة تصل إلى خمسة بالمائة. لذلك، سيؤدي هذا إلى الكثير من الإنفاق المتعلق بالدفاع”. تستمر القصة أسفل الإعلان وحضر المائدة المستديرة أيضا وزير العلاقات الدولية والفرنكوفونية كريستوفر سكيت وممثل كيبيك في باريس الجنرال هنري بول روسو. هذه هي مهمة فريشيت الثانية في الخارج. وقد زار واشنطن قبل بضعة أسابيع. رئيس الوزراء موجود في باريس حتى 20 مايو. © 2026 الصحافة الكندية رابط المصدر

Andrés Larroque habló sobre los rumores de una candidatura de Riquelme en provincia de Buenos Aires
content: Andrés “Cuervo” Larroque , ministro de Desarrollo de la Comunidad en la provincia de Buenos Aires, se refirió este lunes a los rumores periodísticos que circularon sobre una posible candidatura del presidente de Boca, Juan Román Riquelme , en territorio bonaerense y de cara a las elecciones de 2027. Durante una entrevista radial, el funcionario que responde a Axel Kicillof dijo desconocer que el ídolo del Xeneize tenga la intención de sumarse a la contienda electoral. “Nunca lo escuché. En el espacio nuestro nunca lo escuché. No, la verdad que no” , dijo en diálogo con Toti Pasman para Radio La Red . Respecto de si le parece una figura “interesante” para disputar la gobernación de la Provincia, Larroque se sinceró: “No sabía que él estaba con la pretensión. Yo no lo escuché nunca. En todas las reuniones que tuve, no escuché nada al respecto. Es presidente de Boca y me parece que ya tiene mucho con eso”. En otro tramo de la entrevista, el ministro bonaerense cuestionó al presidente Javier Milei por su reciente defensa pública de José Luis Espert, luego de que el mandatario respaldara al exdiputado en medio de la controversia por su vínculo con el empresario Federico “Fred” Machado , acusado en Estados Unidos. “Me parece que el Gobierno está en una situación de alergia a sí mismo. Tiene que mirar más a la sociedad y preocuparse por los problemas reales de la gente. Mientras tanto, uno ve que el Presidente se aferra a los problemas de personajes muy cuestionados por la Justicia y con un juicio de la opinión pública categórico . Eso pasa cuando te desconectás de la realidad y entrás en las disputas internas”, sostuvo. Consultado además sobre la intención del exgobernador sanjuanino Sergio Uñac de competir por la presidencia el año próximo, Larroque consideró positiva la aparición de nuevos dirigentes dentro del peronismo. “Me parece bárbaro. Mientras más compañeros tengan la pretensión, al peronismo le sirve. Es prematuro, pero estamos en un proceso de construcción. Invitamos a todos los compañeros y compañeras que quieran postularse y a todos los espacios que se vayan generando. No tenemos ningún temor a la competencia”, afirmó. En ese sentido, también evitó confirmar una eventual candidatura presidencial de Axel Kicillof y pidió priorizar el ordenamiento interno del espacio . “Hoy no hay tal candidatura. Necesitamos más que una candidatura. Necesitamos poder darle certezas a la sociedad. Mostrar una fuerza...

Why Google’s Remy leaks have enterprise architects rethinking the AI stack
content: Google’s reported development of Remy, a new OpenClaw -style agent that can perform actions on a user’s behalf, has lit up discussion boards and newswires since Business Insider first reported on its existence this month. Unconfirmed reports cited by the publication suggest that Google is testing Remy inside a staff-only version of Gemini. According to an internal document seen by Business Insider , Google can integrate with a variety of its other services — but Google itself has reportedly declined to comment on the existence of Remy. “Remy is your 24/7 personal agent for work, school, and daily life, powered by Gemini. It elevates the Gemini app into a true assistant that can take actions on your behalf — not just answer questions or generate content,” reports the publication. Google already offers Gemini Agent , a consumer-level service that it lauds as the “next step in building towards a universal AI assistant,” with features including live web browsing, deep research, and integration with some of Google’s apps to execute actions once the agent receives user confirmation. If Remy is real, it could represent a significant step forward toward more orchestrated AI services that integrate into human workflows, rather than occasional chat-based adjuncts. Google DeepMind CEO Hassabis: “Two big breakthroughs needed for AGI” Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis has spoken widely on his long-term ambitions for artificial general intelligence, and on subjects as diverse as renewable energy and global water access. He has also alluded to the need for AI models to make wider contextual connections to herald the kind of work Remy may deliver. In an interview in January during the 2026 World Economic Forum in Davos, Hassasbis said he is , “Definitely a subscriber to the idea that maybe we need one or two more big breakthroughs before we’ll get to AGI. I think they’re along the lines of things like continual learning, better memory, longer context windows (or perhaps more efficient context windows would be the right way to say it)... so don’t store everything, just store the important things.” “The next evolution of the AI stack will be extending agent frameworks with durable workflow and orchestration primitives rather than treating agents as isolated prompt-response systems.” —Yaron Schneider, CTO, Diagrid. AI enters the workflow Yaron Schneider , CTO and co-founder of the agentic development company Diagrid , tells The New Stack that Google’s Remy project...

Alex Saab permanecerá detenido en Miami: los cargos que le imputaron al testaferro de Nicolás Maduro
content: MIAMI (Estados Unidos), 18/05/2026.- Vista del Tribunal Federal Wilkie D. Ferguson Jr., donde Alex Saab comparecerá en Miami, Florida, EE. UU., el 18 de mayo de 2026. Saab, un empresario colombo-venezolano acusado de ser el principal asesor financiero de Nicolás Maduro, llegó a Miami el fin de semana tras ser entregado a las autoridades estadounidenses por Venezuela. Saab enfrenta ocho cargos de conspiración para el lavado de dinero relacionados con un esquema de 350 millones de dólares que involucra contratos del gobierno venezolano y el programa de alimentos subsidiados CLAP. EFE/EPA/CRISTÓBAL HERRERA-ULASHKEVICH El exministro venezolano y empresario colombiano, Alex Saab, señalado en EE.UU. como “testaferro” de Nicolás Maduro, se presentó este lunes en una corte federal de Miami, en la que enfrentará cargos de lavado de dinero, tras su deportación del sábado desde ese país. lapatilla.com Saab, de 54 años y quien ya había sido procesado penalmente en Estados Unidos, fue acusado este lunes por el Distrito Sur de Florida de lavado de dinero y conspiración para realizar transacciones financieras, así como de ocultar y disfrazar el origen de fondos. Vestido con un overol marrón, Saab, considerado un estrecho aliado de Maduro, ya había sido acusado previamente en Estados Unidos de haberse enriquecido ilícitamente mediante contratos gubernamentales y de actuar como presunto testaferro del exlíder chavista. El sábado el régimen de Delcy Rodríguez, informó de la deportación de Saab por “la comisión de diversos delitos en Estados Unidos”. Saab, quien llegó a Miami la noche del sábado al aeropuerto de Opa-locka, quedará detenido sin posibilidad de fianza hasta el próximo 24 de junio, según dijo durante la corta audiencia la jueza Marty Fulgueira Elfenbein. Nacido Colombia y de origen libanés, Saab ya había enfrentado en Miami cargos de lavado de dinero, pero fue liberado en 2023 durante el gobierno de Joe Biden (2021-2025) como parte de un intercambio por una decena de prisioneros en Venezuela y regresó a ese país, donde fue nombrado ministro de Industrias y Producción Nacional. El empresario había sido detenido en Cabo Verde en 2020 y luego extraditado a Estados Unidos, pero el juicio nunca se llevó a cabo. La deportación de Saab se produce en el marco de una colaboración entre los gobiernos de Washington y Caracas, a cargo de la chavista Rodríguez, desde la operación estadounidense que depuso a Maduro el pasado 3 de...

Iraqi man accused of NYC synagogue plot after attacks in Europe and Canada in response to Iran war
content: NEW YORK (AP) — An Iraqi national accused of plotting at least 18 terror attacks in Europe in retaliation for the U.S. and Israel’s war with Iran, including firebombing a bank in Amsterdam and stabbing Jewish men in London, has been arrested and charged with supporting Iran-backed terrorist organizations. According to a complaint unsealed Friday in federal court in Manhattan, Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi sought to attack a New York City synagogue last month and provided an undercover law enforcement officer with photos and maps of Jewish centers in Los Angeles and Scottsdale, Arizona, that he planned to target. Al-Saadi is also accused of involvement in two recent attacks in Canada: an attack on a synagogue and a shooting at the U.S. consulate in Toronto in March . U.S. prosecutors said he directed and urged other people to attack U.S. and Israeli interests, including by killing Americans and Jews. Al-Saadi posted about the attacks on Snapchat and Telegram and spoke about them in phone calls recorded by an FBI informant whose help he solicited in planning attacks in the U.S., the complaint said. Al-Saadi told the informant he was willing to kill people in any such attacks, the complaint said. Al-Saadi, 32, is charged with conspiracy to provide material support to Kata’ib Hizballah, an Iran-backed Iraqi Shia militant group, and Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps, both of which have been designated by the U.S. government as foreign terrorist organizations. U.S. prosecutors said Al-Saadi was a Kata’ib Hizballah commander. He is also charged with conspiring and providing material support for acts of terrorism and conspiring to bomb a place of public use. If convicted, he could be sentenced to life in prison. FBI Director Kash Patel described Al-Saadi as a “high-value target responsible for mass global terrorism” and said his arrest was the product of “a righteous mission executed brilliantly” by the agency’s agents and law enforcement partners. New York City Police Commissioner Jessica Tisch, whose officers investigated Al-Saadi as part of the FBI’s Joint Terrorism Task Force, said the case “puts into stark relief the global threats posed by the Iranian regime and its proxies like Kata’ib Hizballah.” Al-Saadi smiled throughout his initial court appearance but did not speak. Through his lawyer, he called himself a political prisoner and a prisoner of war and said the U.S. is persecuting him for his relationship with Qasem Soleimani, the...

CE: Justiça aceita denúncia e torna réus irmãos que deceparam mão de jovem
content: CE: Justiça aceita denúncia e torna réus irmãos que deceparam mão de jovem Resumo A Justiça do Ceará recebeu a denúncia do MP-CE (Ministério Público do Ceará) contra os irmãos Ronivaldo Rocha dos Santos, 40, e Evangelista Rocha dos Santos, 34, acusados de tentarem matar, com golpes de foice, uma jovem de 21 anos, que teve uma das mãos inteiramente decepada. O TJ-CE (Tribunal de Justiça do Ceará) informou hoje à coluna que a 1a Vara de Quixeramobim tornou-os réus na última quinta-feira (14) por tentativa de feminicídio. A Justiça determinou a citação dos acusados, que estão presos desde o dia 1o, para responderem à acusação por escrito. Com ambos virando réus, ele vão apresentar defesa, e começa a fase de produção de provas, com novos depoimentos de testemunhas e perícias. Ao fim desse processo, o juiz vai decidir se pronuncia os réus —se sim, determina a formação de júri popular para julgá-los. Denúncia Ana Clara, 21, teve uma das mãos decepada totalmente e a outra, quase totalmente, em um ataque a golpes de foice. Ronivaldo era marido da vítima havia dois anos, mas quem a golpeou foi o cunhado. Os dois estão presos preventivamente e, de acordo com a polícia, confessaram o crime. No relatório de indiciamento, o delegado William Lopes classificou o crime como feminicídio tentado por se tratar de uma situação de violência doméstica. Ele apontou dois agravantes: dissimulação (quando o suspeito engana para matar) e uso de meio cruel. Em caso de condenação, a pena pode aumentar de 1/3 a 50%. Ainda de acordo com o delegado, um familiar da vítima disse em depoimento que, dois meses antes da tentativa de feminicídio, Ronivaldo já tinha ameaçado cortar as mãos dela. Como o caso está sob segredo de Justiça, a coluna não conseguiu identificar o advogado de defesa dos irmãos. O espaço está aberto para manifestação. Dinâmica do crime O delegado conta que o casal brigou na noite do dia 30, e Ana expulsou Ronivaldo da casa onde moravam juntos havia cerca de dois anos. "Depois disso, ele foi buscar o Evangelista em casa com objetivo exclusivo de executá-la", diz Lopes. A investigação apontou também que, durante a briga, Ana arremessou uma pedra no vidro do carro de Ronivaldo. Nas imagens de câmeras de segurança, é possível ver a discussão dos dois e a cobrança que Ronivaldo faz à jovem pelo vidro quebrado do veículo. Após a discussão, Ana conseguiu fugir e entrou em casa, mas Evangelista...

Jofra Archer and Eshan Malinga have 17 wickets each. Bhuvneshwar looks the favourite to win the Purple Cap once again. The right-arm pacer won the Purple Cap in 2016 and 2017. Petróleo vira principal pressão sobre inflação, diz governo
content: A SPE (Secretaria de Política Econômica do Ministério da Fazenda) elevou de 3,7% para 4,5% a estimativa para o IPCA (Índice de Preços ao Consumidor Amplo) de 2026 por causa da alta do petróleo provocada pelo conflito entre Estados Unidos e Irã. A revisão foi apresentada nesta 2a feira (18.mai.2026) no Boletim Macrofiscal da SPE. Eis a íntegra (PDF – 824 kB). O governo manteve a projeção de crescimento do PIB em 2,3%, apesar da piora do cenário externo e da expectativa de juros altos por mais tempo. A secretária de Política Econômica, Débora Freire, e o subsecretário da SPE, Rafael Leão, deram declarações durante apresentação do relatório em Brasília. Segundo a equipe econômica, o fechamento do estreito de Ormuz elevou o preço internacional do petróleo, interrompeu o ciclo de queda de juros nas economias avançadas e aumentou a pressão inflacionária global. O choque energético afeta combustíveis, alimentos, câmbio e a condução da política monetária brasileira. O boletim estabelece que a cotação média do barril Brent para 2026 subiu de US$ 73,1 em março para US$ 91,2 em maio, uma alta próxima de 25%. Ao mesmo tempo, a expectativa para a taxa Selic terminal passou de 12% para 13% ao ano. Segundo Rafael Leão, o choque do petróleo se tornou o principal vetor de pressão sobre a inflação brasileira. O IPCA acumulado em 12 meses avançou de 3,8% em fevereiro para 4,4% em abril. Os preços monitorados passaram de 4,4% para 6,1%, puxados principalmente pela gasolina. Os alimentos também passaram a pressionar o índice. O governo identificou alta em carnes, leite, arroz e produtos in natura. A SPE afirmou que parte do movimento decorre de choques de oferta e do ciclo pecuário. Apesar da revisão inflacionária, a SPE manteve a projeção de crescimento do PIB em 2,3% para 2026. O governo espera desaceleração da atividade no 2o e no 3o trimestres, com recuperação no fim do ano puxada pela indústria manufatureira. O relatório também aponta que a economia brasileira continua sustentada pelo mercado de trabalho resiliente. A taxa de desocupação ficou em 6,1% no trimestre encerrado em março, o menor nível da série histórica para o período. A SPE declarou ainda que o governo adotou medidas fiscais para reduzir parte dos efeitos da alta internacional do petróleo. Entre elas estão subsídios ao diesel, redução temporária de PIS/Cofins e linhas de financiamento para empresas. O impacto mensal das ações foi...

Gunfire Again Hits Same Hough Block on Cleveland’s East Side
content: A Monday morning shooting has put Cleveland’s Hough neighborhood back under the microscope after a man was found with gunshot wounds on Curtiss Court. Police say officers were called around 8 a.m. to the 5700 block of Curtiss Court, where they found a man who had been shot. His condition has not been released, and detectives are still piecing together what led up to the gunfire. According to Cleveland19 , which first reported the incident, the shooting happened in the 5700 block of Curtiss Court, and police have not yet provided additional details about the victim. The initial report was written by Julia Thyret. Neighborhood History and Context Hough has a long history of economic disinvestment and episodes of unrest that continue to shape local public safety challenges, according to Case Western Reserve University’s Encyclopedia of Cleveland History . That backdrop helps explain why any new shooting in the neighborhood tends to draw close attention from residents and city officials alike. Repeat Incidents on Curtiss Court This stretch of Curtiss Court has seen serious violence before. On June 25, 2025, 20-year-old Tyresse Sanford was fatally shot on the same 5700 block, Cleveland19 reported at the time. That earlier case was handled by the Cleveland Division of Police Homicide Unit. For the latest shooting, investigators are again asking for the public’s help. Anyone with information is urged to contact the Cleveland Division of Police Homicide Unit at (216) 623-5464, according to the city’s contact list . Anonymous tips can be submitted to Crime Stoppers of Cuyahoga County at (216) 252-7463.

San Diego Shooting: Active Shooter At Islamic Center Of San Diego Sparks Police Response, Injuries Reported
content: Police in San Diego are responding to reports of a possible shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego, according to local authorities. The San Diego Police Department said officers are on scene at the Islamic Center located in the 7000 block of Eckstrom Avenue following reports of an active shooter. “SDPD is on scene at the Islamic Center of San Diego in the 7000 block of Eckstrom Ave for a reported active shooter,” the department wrote in a social media update. Authorities urged the public to avoid the area as the situation remains active. No additional details about injuries, suspects or arrests were immediately available. Police said further updates will follow as the investigation develops. San Diego Mayor Todd Gloria acknowledged the police response and wrote on X, "I am aware of the active shooter situation at the Islamic Center of San Diego in Clairemont and am continuing to receive updates from law enforcement. Emergency personnel are on scene and actively working to protect the community and secure the area. Please avoid the area and follow instructions from public safety officials. We will share updates as more information becomes available."

1990 Chevrolet Corvette ZR-1
content: This 1990 Chevrolet Corvette is a black-over-black ZR-1 that spent eight years in a warehouse before it was purchased in 2020 by the current owner, who commissioned various mechanical repairs for the 5.7-liter LT5 V8 under their ownership along with the replacement of the clutch slave cylinder for the ZF six-speed manual transmission. The automatic climate-control system was converted to use R134a refrigerant under current ownership, and the tires and multiple braking components have also been replaced. Further details include the standard Selective Ride and Handling Package, a removable transparent roof panel, 17′′ five-spoke alloy wheels, power-adjustable sport seats, and a Pioneer stereo. This C4 Corvette ZR-1 is now offered on dealer consignment by a BaT Local Partner with service records, a damage-free Carfax report, and a clean Maryland title. The C4 ZR-1 was sold between 1990 and 1995, and it featured a wider tail compared to the standard C4 Corvette and introduced a convex rear fascia with squared-off taillights. This example is finished in black and features pop-up headlights with LED bulbs, fog lamps, a removable transparent roof panel, fender aero-vents, and heated side mirrors. Scratches are noted, and the power-adjust function on the side mirrors does not work. The ZR-1 was equipped with the three-mode Selective Ride and Handling Package, which was designed in consultation with Lotus and featured Bilstein shock absorbers. Staggered-width 17′′ five-spoke alloy wheels are mounted with 275/40 front and 315/30 rear Goodyear Eagle F1 tires tires that were installed in March 2020. The brake master cylinder and power booster were replaced in April 2022, and the rear hubs were replaced in preparation for the sale. The cabin features two sport bucket seats upholstered in black leather, along with matching carpets and door panels. A Pioneer stereo has been added, and additional amenities include R134a-based automatic climate control, an onboard computer, a tire pressure warning system, a Delco Bose Gold Series sound system, and power windows and locks. The parking brake lever engages, though the seller notes that the handle is loose. The passenger seat control switches are missing, and the cruise control does not work. The leather-wrapped steering wheel frames a central digital speedometer and fuel readout flanked by an analog tachometer and gauges for oil pressure, oil temperature, coolant temperature, and voltage. title: Mitos e verdades sobre o cappuccino
content: O cappuccino é um clássico que conquistou espaço na rotina de muita gente ao redor do mundo. De origem italiana, ele combina espresso, leite vaporizado e espuma de leite, resultado em uma bebida cremosa e aromática. Mas, apesar da popularidade, nem tudo o que circula sobre ele corresponde totalmente à realidade. Para esclarecer, confira a seguir o que é mito e o que é verdade sobre o cappuccino . Veja a matéria completa . “Só se faz cappuccino na máquina de espresso” Mito . Existem outras maneiras de preparar cappuccino com ótimos resultados. A prensa francesa, também conhecida como french press , é uma delas. Embora seja mais conhecida pelo café, ela também pode ser usada com leite aquecido para gerar espuma. O processo é fácil: ao subir e descer o êmbolo repetidamente, você injeta ar no leite e cria uma espuma levinha. “A temperatura do leite deve ser de até 68 °C” Verdade . O ideal é esquentar o leite até 68 °C para garantir o melhor resultado. Acima disso, suas proteínas quebram e a cremosidade acaba sendo comprometida. Essa textura é essencial tanto para o cappuccino quanto para conseguir fazer os famosos desenhos com leite. Capuccino “Leite integral não deve ser usado no cappuccino” Mito . Por ter mais gordura e proteína, o leite integral costuma ser o mais indicado para fazer espuma e latte art , oferecendo mais estabilidade, brilho e facilidade no preparo. As versões semi e desnatadas até funcionam, mas entregam uma espuma mais leve, menos cremosa e menos duradoura. “O melhor é usar café espresso de torra média” Verdade . Um cappuccino bem feito pede um café espresso de torra média, com bom corpo e levemente doce, um perfil que equilibra mais com o leite. Já os cafés muito ácidos ou muito amargos podem brigar com o leite, comprometendo o resultado final da bebida.

title: OAS Takes Historic Stand Against Forced Abortions on Sex Trafficking Victims
content: Human trafficking does not stop at sexual exploitation. It reaches into clinics, across borders, through criminal networks, and into the bodies of women and girls who have already lost nearly everything. On May 15, 2026, the Organization of American States (OAS)recognized “trafficking in persons for the purpose of reproductive exploitation” as an emerging form of human trafficking. That recognition is so important because trafficked women and girls do not face exploitation in fragments. Their abusers do not separate violence, coercion, and abortion into neat categories. The same criminal networks that exploit their bodies also pressure, threaten, or force them into abortions when pregnancy becomes inconvenient for the trafficker. That is reproductive exploitation. A girl trafficked for sex may become pregnant by her abuser or by a buyer. A woman held under threat may carry a child her trafficker sees as a liability. In those moments, abortion does not represent freedom. It can become another act of control, another way to erase evidence, protect the exploiter, and return the victim to abuse. Follow LifeNews.com on Instagram for pro-life pictures and videos. The abortion industry and its allies will not say this clearly. They prefer slogans. They call abortion “health care” and “autonomy,” even when the woman or girl has no real autonomy left. They ignore the trafficked child taken to a clinic by the very person exploiting her. They ignore the terrified woman who was told that pregnancy would cost her food, shelter, safety, or her life. A trafficker does not need a locked door when fear does the work. This is why the OAS language matters. It gives governments a chance to confront reproductive exploitation as a real trafficking threat, not a side issue. It recognizes that traffickers recruit, solicit, manipulate, and control victims through methods that demand prevention, investigation, and public awareness. No civilized society should treat abortion as a clean solution to trafficking. When a trafficked girl is pregnant, there are two human beings who need protection. The mother needs rescue, safety, medical care, legal support, and a path out of captivity. Her unborn child needs recognition as a living victim, not as evidence to destroy. Abortion can help traffickers hide their crimes. It can return victims to the streets. It can sever the only visible sign that abuse occurred. It can leave a wounded girl bleeding, grieving, and still trapped with the...

الأمين العام للأمم المتحدة يحذر في المنتدى الحضري العالمي في باكو: “لا يوجد مجتمع محصن” من أزمة السكن
content: حذر الأمين العام للأمم المتحدة أنطونيو غوتيريس، المندوبين المشاركين في المنتدى الحضري العالمي المنعقد في باكو يوم الاثنين، من أن أزمة الإسكان العالمية تؤثر على الدول الغنية بقدر ما تؤثر على الدول الفقيرة. “لم يسلم أي مجتمع من المدن سريعة النمو في العالم النامي إلى الاقتصادات المتقدمة ذات الإيجارات المرتفعة وارتفاع معدلات التشرد.” إعلان إعلان وفي رسالة بالفيديو إلى زعماء العالم وصناع السياسات المجتمعين في اليوم الثاني من محادثات المنتدى، قال غوتيريش إن الأزمة التي تؤثر على ما يقرب من 3 مليارات شخص “تتفاقم” وسط “عدم استقرار اقتصادي وجيوسياسي واسع النطاق” ودعا الحكومات إلى وضع الإسكان “في قلب التنمية المستدامة”. وقد ربط هذه القضية بتجربته الشخصية، مستذكرًا عمله التطوعي في الأحياء الفقيرة في موطنه لشبونة. وقال: “لقد رأيت مدى عمق تأثير السكن على صحة الناس وتعليمهم ومستقبلهم”. ألقى زعيم البلد المضيف، رئيس أذربيجان إلهام علييف، كلمة أمام المندوبين حول التحول الحضري في البلاد. وأشار إلى إعادة تطوير المنطقة الصناعية الملوثة بالنفط في باكو، والمعروفة الآن باسم المدينة البيضاء، إلى منطقة متعددة الاستخدامات. وقال علييف: “كانت باكو أول مدينة في العالم يتم فيها إنتاج النفط عام 1846”. “اليوم لدينا المدينة البيضاء، وهي نموذج للتنمية الحضرية. إنها مدينة داخل مدينة.” وقال علييف: “على مدى العشرين عاما الماضية، أنشأنا أكثر من 100 متنزه وساحة وحديقة في باكو”. وقالت رئيسة الجمعية العامة للأمم المتحدة أنالينا بيربوك للمندوبين إن عواقب السكن غير المناسب تمتد الآن إلى ما هو أبعد من المأوى. وقال: “بدون سكن آمن، تتدهور الصحة، ويتعطل التعليم، ويتعمق انعدام الأمن، وتزداد عدم المساواة، وتصبح المجتمعات أكثر عرضة للصدمات المناخية والكوارث”. وقال إن أكثر من 1.1 مليار شخص يعيشون في مستوطنات غير رسمية أو أحياء فقيرة، وأكثر من 300 مليون شخص بلا مأوى. وقال إن البناء وحده ليس الحل. “هناك حاجة إلى نهج نظامي يربط الإسكان بالبنية التحتية والخدمات الأساسية والقدرة على التكيف مع تغير المناخ والتمويل والتخطيط الشامل.” وحضر المنتدى أكثر من 40 ألف مشارك مسجل من 182 دولة، مما يجعله واحدًا من أكثر الدورات حضورًا في تاريخه. وقال المنسق الوطني الأذربيجاني للمنتدى الحضري العالمي الثالث عشر أنار جولييف إنها المرة الأولى في تاريخ المنتدى التي يتم فيها عقد جلسة مخصصة لرؤساء الدول على مستوى الدول بناء على مبادرة أذربيجان. وقال جولييف للمندوبين: “إن المنتدى الحضري العالمي هو أكثر من مجرد مؤتمر”. “إنها منصة مهمة لتعزيز السياسة الحضرية العالمية وتعزيز الشراكات ودعم تنفيذ الأجندة الحضرية الجديدة وأهداف التنمية المستدامة.” وقال: “المدن أصبحت الآن في قلب التحديات المتعلقة بتغير المناخ، والقدرة على تحمل تكاليف السكن، والهجرة، ومرونة البنية...

title: Chá de camomila: para que serve? Veja os benefícios e passo a passo
content: Com aqueda das temperaturas em diversas regiões do país, as bebidas quentes ganham ainda mais espaço na rotina. Entre tantas opções para aquecer os dias frios, o chá de camomila se destaca pelo aroma delicado, pelo sabor levemente adocicado e pela sensação de conforto que proporciona a cada xícara. Mas não para por aí: ele também chama atenção pelas vantagens que pode oferecer à saúde, tornando seu consumo uma opção valiosa e agradável em qualquer época do ano. Os benefícios De acordo com matéria de Regina Célia Pereira para o Pulsa do Estadão , a tonalidade amarela, o perfume e os benefícios da camomila têm relação com substâncias naturais como alfa-bisabolol, apigenina e patuletina. Veja a matéria completa . Pesquisas cientificas apontam a planta como uma possível aliada no relaxamento e no combate aos sintomas da tensão pré-menstrual (TPM). Além disso, os compostos têm ação anti-inflamatória e antioxidante, podendo favorecer inclusive no trato digestório. Chá de camomila Vale lembrar... Sozinho, nenhum alimento faz milagres. Para manter a saúde em dia, é importante também manter hábitos saudáveis, como boa ingestão de água, prática regular de atividades físicas e alimentação balanceada. Em caso de dúvidas, consulte sempre um médico. Receita completa do chá de camomila Depois de conhecer algumas das vantagens da camomila, chegou a hora de preparar o chá em casa. Essa receita da empresa londrina The Tea Makers mostra como garantir uma bebida saborosa e de qualidade em apenas 5 passos. Confira a seguir. Veja a matéria completa . Ingredientes Chá de Camomila em folhas soltas 200ml de água fervente (100°C) 1 xícara ou caneca 1 infusor de chá Modo de preparo Meça 1-2g (uma colher de chá cheia) de flores de camomila em folhas soltas e adicione-as ao infusor. Coloque o infusor na xícara ou caneca, depois despeje aproximadamente 200ml de água fervente sobre as flores. Deixe o chá de camomila fermentar por 3-4 minutos. Remova cuidadosamente o infusor do seu copo. Adoce com mel, se desejar.

28k-Mile 2015 Mercedes-Benz E550 Cabriolet
content: This 2015 Mercedes-Benz E550 is a black-over-black cabriolet that has 28k miles, 8k of which have been added since the seller purchased the car in May 2025. It is powered by a twin-turbocharged 4.7-liter V8 paired with a seven-speed automatic transmission. Equipment includes the Premium Package, a black convertible top, 18′′ AMG split-spoke wheels, a back-up camera, Blind Spot Assist, navigation, heated and ventilated multi-contour front seats, Airscarf neck warmers, a Harman Kardon sound system, Keyless-Go, and dual-zone automatic climate control. This A207 is now offered with the owner’s manual, service records, a clean Carfax report, and a Texas title in the seller’s name. The car is finished in black (040) and features a black soft top, polished dual exhaust outlets, and LED headlights and taillights. Photos showing finish imperfections are included in the gallery. The 18′′ AMG split-spoke wheels are mounted with Michelin Primacy MXM4 tires. The car is equipped with a three-link independent strut-type front suspension and a five-link independent rear suspension with stabilizer bars as well as Dynamic Handling electronically controlled shock absorbers. Braking is handled by four-wheel ventilated discs with cross-drilled front rotors. The heated and ventilated multi-contour front seats and two rear bucket seats are upholstered in black leather. Interior amenities include front-seat position memory, wood trim, Airscarf neck warmers, a back-up camera, Blind Spot Assist, Active Park Assistant, cruise control, pop-up roll bars, dual-zone automatic climate control, a Harman Kardon LOGIC7 sound system, Keyless-Go, and COMAND infotainment with navigation. The leather-wrapped steering wheel frames a central 160-mph speedometer with an inset information display alongside an 8k-rpm tachometer and gauges for fuel level and coolant temperature. The digital odometer indicates 28k miles, approximately 8k of which were added under current ownership. The twin-turbocharged 4.7-liter V8 was factory rated at 402 horsepower and 443 lb-ft of torque. The oil was most recently changed in August 2025. Power is sent to the rear wheels through a 7G-Tronic seven-speed automatic transmission. The Carfax report is free from accidents or other reported damage.

Bruxelas admite “constrangimentos regionais” e medidas de poupança de combustível
content: A Comissão Europeia admitiu esta segunda-feira “constrangimentos regionais de abastecimento” de petróleo caso se mantenha o bloqueio no Estreito de Ormuz até junho , que afeta, sobretudo, o combustível de aviação, equacionando medidas de poupança no espaço comunitário. “Embora atualmente não exista escassez de combustível na UE [União Europeia], poderão surgir constrangimentos regionais de abastecimento nas próximas semanas caso o bloqueio do fornecimento de petróleo através do Estreito de Ormuz não seja resolvido, sendo o combustível de aviação a principal preocupação”, afirma a Direção-Geral da Energia do executivo comunitário em comunicado. De acordo com a nota, divulgada após uma reunião do Grupo de Coordenação do Petróleo – que juntou especialistas da Comissão Europeia, dos países da UE, da Agência Internacional da Energia, da NATO e representantes da indústria petrolífera –, os especialistas “salientaram que, se a situação persistir, será necessário combinar qualquer libertação dessas reservas com medidas de poupança de combustível, para que as reservas de emergência possam ser geridas de forma mais eficiente e durante mais tempo”. O grupo reuniu-se para discutir a situação da segurança do abastecimento de petróleo na Europa e a coordenação da resposta ao nível da UE, enquanto o conflito no Médio Oriente se prolonga envolvendo Estados Unidos, Israel e Irão, tendo discutido “as perspetivas para a UE e a abordagem coordenada da União caso a situação se prolongue até junho”. “O Grupo de Coordenação do Petróleo continuará a reunir-se de forma regular e frequente para assegurar uma resposta coordenada a quaisquer desenvolvimentos relacionados com o abastecimento de combustíveis de aviação na UE”, é indicado. B ruxelas adianta que “continuará a avaliar o impacto global da situação no Médio Oriente na Europa, a apoiar ações coordenadas sempre que necessário e a manter uma comunicação regular com os países da UE, a Agência Internacional da Energia e os participantes do mercado”. Esta segunda, o diretor executivo da Agência Internacional de Energia, Fatih Birol, advertiu que a ‘almofada’ das reservas comerciais de petróleo acumuladas antes da guerra no Médio Oriente e do encerramento de Ormuz se vai esgotar numa questão de semanas. Antes, há cerca de uma semana, a Comissão Europeia disse estar a mapear as reservas de emergência na UE dada a crise energética causada pelo...

title: Trump says he’s called off Iran strike planned for Tuesday at request of Gulf allies
content: President Donald Trump gestures to reporters as he walks across the South Lawn of the White House, Friday, May 15, 2026, in Washington, on return from Beijing where he met with China's President Xi Jinping. (AP Photo/Jacquelyn Martin) President Donald Trump gestures to reporters as he walks across the South Lawn of the White House, Friday, May 15, 2026, in Washington, on return from Beijing where he met with China's President Xi Jinping. (AP Photo/Jacquelyn Martin) WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump said he is holding off on a military strike on Iran planned for Tuesday because “serious negotiations” are underway. Trump’s announcement in a social media post Monday came as he had threated the clock was ticking for Iran to strike a deal or fighting would renew after a fragile ceasefire. The president did not offer details about the planned attack but said but he instructed the U.S. military “to be prepared to go forward with a full, large scale assault of Iran, on a moment’s notice, in the event that an acceptable Deal is not reached.” Trump had not previously disclosed that he was planning a strike for May 19, but over the weekend he warned, “For Iran, the Clock is Ticking, and they better get moving, FAST, or there won’t be anything left of them.” Trump has been threatening for weeks that the ceasefire struck in mid-April could end if Iran did not strike a deal, with shifting parameters for striking such an agreement. Trump said in his social media post that he was calling off the planned strike at the request of allies in the Middle East, including the leaders of Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the United Arab Emirates. Trump has repeatedly set deadlines for Tehran and then backed off. Trump in recent days has also spoken with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and Chinese President Xi Jinping about the Iran war. Source

Sexta edição do “Mulheres que Inspiram” consagra legado em Blumenau
content: Com a participação de Analice Nicolau, o fórum Mulheres que Inspiram debate o posicionamento de marcas no mercado A sexta edição do fórum corporativo "Mulheres que Inspiram" será realizada no dia 27 de maio no Norte Shopping Blumenau, consolidando um espaço de debate focado no desenvolvimento socioeconômico regional. O encontro institucional une a discussão sobre o fortalecimento de marcas ao impacto comunitário, direcionando toda a sua arrecadação financeira ao Hospital Santo Antônio. Entre as principais lideranças confirmadas para a abertura oficial, destaca-se a estrategista de comunicação Analice Nicolau, que migrou da televisão para o ecossistema digital e hoje atua instrumentalizando empresárias pelo país a tomarem seus espaços de destaque no mercado atual. A relevância do fórum é respaldada pelos indicadores econômicos divulgados pelo Observatório do Sebrae/SC, os quais apontam que o estado de Santa Catarina possui atualmente 490.925 empresas ativas sob o comando direto de mulheres. Este contingente equivale a cerca de 35% do volume total de negócios registrados no território catarinense. No recorte geográfico do Vale do Itajaí, o empreendedorismo feminino responde por 36% dos pequenos negócios estruturados, enquanto o município de Blumenau concentra isoladamente mais de 25 mil mulheres à frente de atividades empresariais, evidenciando uma força produtiva em constante expansão regional. O desdobramento prático dessa força econômica materializa-se na homenagem a doze lideranças de destaque: Cristiane Soethe, Mara Rúbia Cattoni Poffo, Joanna Tomio, Gilmara O. Carl, Solange Zaniz Poffo, Hellamari Hohl, Isabela Tafner Stollmeier, Tamara Pastor, Fernanda Heining, Marcela Neves Schmidt Zanini, Hanna Hirt e Andréia Regina. Adicionalmente, o evento promove painéis em formato de talk com a participação da arquiteta Marina Otte, da incorporadora Isabela Tafner Stollmeier, da desembargadora Quitéria Tamanini Vieira e da executiva Tamara Pastor. A convergência dessas trajetórias no palco permite a transferência de conhecimentos em áreas críticas da gestão, impulsionando a ocupação de novos espaços diretivos. 6o Mulheres Que Inspiram em Blumenau Sob uma perspectiva técnica de comunicação, a transição dos veículos tradicionais para as plataformas digitais exige que o profissional redesenhe sua atuação com base em propósitos corporativos claros, compreendendo que o legado individual é construído...

Hilfslieferung aus Mexiko und Uruguay in Kuba eingetroffen
content: Inmitten der schweren Versorgungskrise in Kuba ist eine Hilfslieferung aus Mexiko und Uruguay auf der sozialistischen Karibikinsel eingetroffen. An Bord des Schiffes "Asian Katra" befanden sich 1.600 Tonnen Lebensmittel und Hygieneprodukte, wie die staatliche Nachrichtenagentur Prensa latina berichtete. Die Hilfsgüter sollen vor allem an Kinder, Rentner und Bedürftige verteilt werden, sagte der Minister für Lebensmittelindustrie, Alberto López. Kuba steckt derzeit in einer der schwersten Wirtschaftskrisen seiner Geschichte. Die durch Missmanagement und fehlende Investitionen verursachten Versorgungsengpässe werden durch das US-Handelsembargo noch verschärft. Seit Monaten erhält Kuba kaum noch Öl, täglich fällt stundenlang der Strom aus. US-Präsident Trump verschärft Ton gegenüber Havanna Zuletzt hatte sich der Konflikt mit den Vereinigten Staaten verschärft. US-Präsident Donald Trump drohte der Regierung in Havanna mehrfach und brachte eine Übernahme Kubas ins Spiel. Der kubanische Präsident Miguel Díaz-Canel warnte vor einem militärischen Angriff auf sein Land. "Schon die Drohung stellt ein internationales Verbrechen dar. Sollte sie umgesetzt werden, würde dies ein Blutbad mit unabsehbaren Folgen sowie verheerende Auswirkungen auf den Frieden und die regionale Stabilität nach sich ziehen", schrieb er auf der Plattform X.

जबलपुर: एमपी हाईकोर्ट में प्रशासनिक फेरबदल, इंदौर-जबलपुर बेंच के दो जजों के मुख्यालय बदले, 15 जून से लागू होगा आदेश
content: जबलपुर। मध्यप्रदेश हाईकोर्ट में एक अहम प्रशासनिक फेरबदल किया गया है। हाईकोर्ट प्रशासन ने दो वरिष्ठ न्यायाधीशों के मुख्यालय बदलने का आदेश जारी किया है। चीफ जस्टिस संजीव सचदेवा के दस्तखत से जारी आधिकारिक आदेश के अनुसार, जस्टिस प्रणय वर्मा को इंदौर बेंच से जबलपुर मुख्यालय भेजा गया है। वहीं जस्टिस विनय सराफ को जबलपुर से इंदौर बेंच में स्थानांतरित किया गया है। इस फैसले के बाद दोनों न्यायाधीश अपने-अपने नए मुख्यालयों में न्यायिक कार्य संभालेंगे। 15 जून 2026 से लागू होगा नया आदेश हाईकोर्ट प्रशासन ने स्पष्ट किया है कि यह प्रशासनिक बदलाव 15 जून 2026 से प्रभावी माना जाएगा। यानी इसी तारीख से दोनों जज नई जगह पर अपनी जिम्मेदारियां संभालना शुरू करेंगे। बता दें न्यायिक व्यवस्था में इस तरह के ट्रांसफर समय-समय पर किए जाते हैं ताकि विभिन्न बेंचों में मामलों की सुनवाई का संतुलन बना रहे और लंबित मामलों के निपटारे में तेजी लाई जा सके। यह हाईकोर्ट की नियमित प्रशासनिक प्रक्रिया का हिस्सा है। इंदौर और जबलपुर बेंच पर रहेगा असर मध्यप्रदेश हाईकोर्ट की मुख्य पीठ जबलपुर में स्थित है, जबकि इंदौर और ग्वालियर में इसकी खंडपीठें कार्यरत हैं। ऐसे में जजों के मुख्यालय बदलने का असर दोनों बेंचों की कार्यप्रणाली पर भी दिखाई दे सकता है। जस्टिस प्रणय वर्मा अब जबलपुर में विभिन्न मामलों की सुनवाई करेंगे, जबकि जस्टिस विनय सराफ इंदौर बेंच में न्यायिक जिम्मेदारियां निभाएंगे। प्रशासनिक दृष्टि से यह बदलाव अदालतों में कार्य विभाजन और न्यायिक दक्षता को मजबूत करने की दिशा में महत्वपूर्ण माना जाता है। न्यायिक संतुलन बनाए रखने की कवायद कानूनी विशेषज्ञों का मानना है कि हाईकोर्ट समय-समय पर ऐसे प्रशासनिक फैसले लेकर विभिन्न बेंचों में न्यायिक अनुभव और कार्यभार का संतुलन बनाए रखने की कोशिश करता है। इससे मामलों की सुनवाई में तेजी आती है और न्यायिक प्रक्रिया अधिक व्यवस्थित बनती है। हालांकि यह एक नियमित प्रशासनिक प्रक्रिया है, लेकिन न्यायपालिका में इस तरह के बदलावों को हमेशा महत्वपूर्ण माना जाता है क्योंकि इससे अदालतों की कार्यशैली और लंबित मामलों की सुनवाई पर प्रभाव पड़ता है। आदेश के बाद शुरू हुई प्रशासनिक तैयारियां हाईकोर्ट के आदेश जारी होने के बाद अब दोनों बेंचों में प्रशासनिक स्तर पर तैयारियां शुरू हो गई हैं। 15 जून से पहले संबंधित विभाग नए मुख्यालयों में जजों की पदस्थापना और कार्य आवंटन की प्रक्रिया पूरी करेंगे। माना जा रहा है कि इस बदलाव के बाद इंदौर और जबलपुर दोनों बेंचों में मामलों के संचालन और सुनवाई की प्रक्रिया को और बेहतर तरीके से व्यवस्थित किया जा सकेगा।

Funcionário morre após acidente na CSN em Volta Redonda
content: Foto: Arquivo Volta Redonda – Um funcionário da Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional morreu após sofrer um acidente na Usina Presidente Vargas, em Volta Redonda, no início da tarde desta segunda-feira (18). A vítima foi identificada como Alfredo Jorge Toledo Moreira, de 51 anos, que trabalhava como inspetor de manutenção. Segundo a CSN, Alfredo foi socorrido imediatamente após o acidente, mas não resistiu aos ferimentos. Em nota, a empresa lamentou a morte do colaborador e informou que está prestando toda a assistência necessária aos familiares. A companhia também manifestou solidariedade aos amigos e colegas de trabalho da vítima neste momento de tristeza. As circunstâncias do acidente estão sendo apuradas.
